message:
feat(e2e): add production smoke tests, CLI tests, and PlaywrightLogger migration

Add comprehensive production smoke test suite (e2e/web/production-smoke.spec.ts)
targeting jeffreysprompts.com with health checks, performance budgets (LCP <2.5s,
TTFB <1.5s, page weight <2MB), security header validation (HSTS, X-Frame-Options,
CSP), SEO/OG metadata verification, broken asset detection, and navigation tests
across 7 key pages. Closes bd-7sd1.

Enhance CLI E2E tests (e2e/cli-workflow.test.ts) with new "Quick Start & Version"
suite: no-args quick-start help output test and --version semver validation. Fix
export test to check markdown content instead of YAML frontmatter. Closes bd-34w2.

Migrate all 6 remaining E2E spec files from bare @playwright/test imports to
structured PlaywrightLogger integration for consistent test logging across
accessibility (axe-audit, keyboard, screen-reader) and visual (components,
mobile, pages) test suites. Closes bd-2gz8.

Add npm script "test:e2e:prod:smoke" for convenient production smoke test runs.

Update beads issue tracker: close bd-15sw, bd-2gz8, bd-34w2, bd-7sd1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,7 @@
     "test:e2e:web:ui": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts --ui",
     "test:e2e:prod": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.production.config.ts",
     "test:e2e:prod:headed": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.production.config.ts --headed",
+    "test:e2e:prod:smoke": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.production.config.ts e2e/web/production-smoke.spec.ts",
     "test:e2e:console-health": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts e2e/web/console-health.spec.ts",
     "test:e2e:pom": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts e2e/web/homepage-pom.spec.ts",
     "test:e2e": "./scripts/run-e2e.sh",
